scripts.start: node -e "const {spawn}=require('child_process'); const path=require('path'); const backendCwd=path.join(__dirname,'backend'); const agentCwd=path.join(__dirname,'camera-agent'); const backend=spawn(process.execPath,['./bin/www'],{cwd:backendCwd,stdio:'inherit'}); const agent=spawn(process.execPath,['./server.js'],{cwd:agentCwd,stdio:'inherit'}); const shutdown=(code)=>{ try{ backend.kill('SIGTERM'); }catch(e){} try{ agent.kill('SIGTERM'); }catch(e){} process.exit(code); }; backend.on('exit',(code)=>shutdown(code??0)); agent.on('exit',(code)=>shutdown(code??0)); process.on('SIGINT',()=>shutdown(0)); process.on('SIGTERM',()=>shutdown(0));"
